title: The Winning Ticket
writer: Ralph Spence, Richard Schayer, Robert Pirosh
actors: Leo Carrillo, Louise Fazenda, Ted Healy
plot: An Italian-American barber, Joe Thomasello, buys a sweepstakes ticket but doesn't tell his wife, Nora, as she takes a dim view of gambling in any form. The ticket turns out to be the prize winner but Joe can't find it where he hid...
